---
title: "Political Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial dimensions of political power, borders, states, and geopolitics."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---



Welcome to the **Political Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course examines how political power is organized spatially — from the formation of nation-states and boundary disputes to contemporary geopolitical rivalries and electoral geography.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Boundaries and Frontiers (with special reference to India).**
* **Heartland and Rimland Theories.**
* **Trends and Developments in Political Geography.**
* **Geography of Federalism, Electoral Reforms in India, Determinants of Electoral Behaviour.**
* **Geopolitics of Climate Change, Geopolitics of World Resources, Geo-politics of India Ocean.**
* **Regional Organisations of Cooperation (SAARC, ASEAN, OPEC, EU), Neopolitics of World Natural Resources.**

---

{{< include political-geography/01-definition-and-scope.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/02-geopolitics-and-global-strategic-views.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/03-heartland-theory.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/04-rimland-theory.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/05-concept-of-nation-state-and-nation-state.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/06-boundaries-and-frontiers.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/07-politics-of-world-resources.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/08-geography-and-federalism.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/09-boundaries-frontiers.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/10-contemporary-geopolitics.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/11-course-content.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/12-cross-border-terrorism.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/13-electoral-geography.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/14-emergence-of-new-states.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/15-foundations-of-political-geography.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/16-geographical-basis-of-indian-federalism.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/17-geopolitical-theories.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/18-geopolitics-of-south-asia-and-indian-ocean-realm.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/19-indias-role-in-world-affairs.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/20-international-boundary-of-india-and-related-issues.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/21-regional-consciousness-and-inter-state-issues.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/22-state-nation-sovereignty.md >}}

{{< include political-geography/23-state-reorganisation.md >}}
